title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways of combating misinformation and promoting media literacy, then decide which two would be most effective.
options: Teaching critical thinking and media literacy in schools
Requiring social media platforms to label unverified content
Investing in public broadcasting free from commercial interests
Encouraging people to consult multiple news sources
Holding those who spread deliberate misinformation legally accountable

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to media literacy and freedom of the press. Discuss the following ways of combating misinformation and promoting media literacy, then decide which two would be most effective. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two would be most effective.
